ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_number" INTEGER /* Account number associated with the transaction */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the transaction occurred */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the transaction occurred */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the transaction occurred */,
  "atm_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ATM location */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "balance_after_transaction" REAL /* Balance of the account after the transaction */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the ATM device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the ATM */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_number FOREIGN KEY ("account_number") REFERENCES accounts ("account_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_atm_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("atm_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., savings, checking) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "last_transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the last transaction */,
  "last_transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the last transaction */,
  "account_opening_branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the account was opened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_account_opening_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_opening_branch_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the customer (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ATM location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the ATM location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the ATM location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the ATM location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the ATM location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the ATM location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the ATM location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the ATM location */,
  "atm_type" TEXT /* Type of the ATM (e.g., standalone, in-branch) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the ATM was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Maintenance frequency (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "is_reversible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction type is reversible */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., branch manager, fraud analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for additional security and audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fraud_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fraud flag */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being flagged */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of fraud flag (e.g., high amount, unusual location) */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the fraud flag */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date the flag was created */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator assigned to the flag */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "flag_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the fraud flag (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update for the flag */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the fraud flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_flags_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_flags_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
